message:
🌱 Add perses: Dashboard tags mission (#973)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "perses-1733-dashboard-tags",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "perses: Dashboard tags",
+    "description": "Dashboard tags. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Perses version",
+        "description": "Verify your Perses installation supports dashboard tags. This feature was introduced via PR #2683.\n```bash\n# If running via Docker\ndocker exec perses perses --version\n\n# If running on Kubernetes\nkubectl get pods -n perses -o jsonpath='{.items[0].spec.containers[0].image}'\n```\nUpgrade if you are running an older version that does not support tags."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade Perses to a version with dashboard tags",
+        "description": "Upgrade your Perses deployment to include the dashboard tags feature:\n```bash\n# If running via Docker\ndocker pull persesdev/perses:latest\ndocker stop perses && docker rm perses\ndocker run -d --name perses -p 8080:8080 -v perses-data:/etc/perses persesdev/perses:latest\n\n# If running on Kubernetes via Helm\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade perses perses/perses -n perses\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Add tags to dashboards",
+        "description": "Dashboard tags allow you to categorize and search dashboards more conveniently. Add tags to your dashboard metadata:\n```yaml\nKind: Dashboard\nmetadata:\n  name: my-dashboard\n  tags:\n    - oncall\n    - high_severity\n    - production\n```\nTags can also be managed through the Perses UI when editing a dashboard. Use the tags field in the dashboard settings to add, remove, or modify tags."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify dashboard tags work",
+        "description": "Confirm the dashboard tags feature is working:\n1. Open the Perses UI and navigate to the dashboard list\n2. Verify that dashboards display their assigned tags\n3. Use the tag-based search or filter to find dashboards by tag\n4. Edit a dashboard and confirm you can add or remove tags from the UI"
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Added a 'tags' field to the Dashboard metadata struct, allowing users to assign string tags to dashboards for categorization and search. Tags are stored as a list in the dashboard metadata and are surfaced in the UI for filtering.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Kind: Dashboard\nmetadata:\n  name: my-dashboard\n  tags:\n    - oncall\n    - high_severity\n    - production"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "perses",
+      "sandbox",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "perses"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/perses/perses/issues/1733",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/perses/perses",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/perses/perses/pull/2683"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 14,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "docker",
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Perses instance (via Docker or Kubernetes) with at least one dashboard configured."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:45:07.174Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,

+  }
+}
